# ToolLoop

> Borrow tools from people nearby. A community webapp for listing, browsing,
> requesting, and returning shared neighborhood tools. No payments, no rentals.

## Key pages
- [Home](/): What ToolLoop is and how it works.
- [Browse](/browse): All available tools, filterable by category, neighborhood, and availability.
- [List a tool](/tools/new): Add a tool you're willing to lend.
- [Saved](/saved): Tools you have hearted, for quick access later.
- [My borrows](/borrows): Active borrow requests (pending + approved). Enter the owner's return code to confirm a return.
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Manage your tools and incoming borrow requests.

## Concepts
- A borrow request moves through: pending → approved or rejected → returned.
- Approving a request marks the tool unavailable; returning it makes it available again.
- Identity is demo-only (no accounts); switch users from the header.
